goal: 100 founder + investor signups per day; convert visitors to paying Oracle/Pantheon subscribers
conversion_chain: visitor → preview → signup → use (matches/wizard) → pricing → checkout → paid

voice.summary: Picky like investors, skeptical like founders, motivating with evidence-backed next steps

active_mandate: Every agent cycle must propose at least one outbound, in-product habit loop, or instrumentation fix — not monitoring alone.

milestones.note: Pricing experiments + activation loops driving MRR

agent_roles.orchestrator: Set daily focus from funnel data; enforce picky/skeptical/motivating voice and anti-passivity
agent_roles.research: Survey market — founder/investor pain, distrust patterns, competitor retention loops
agent_roles.product: Prioritize backlog — specs for habit loops, analytics gaps, preview→signup→return
agent_roles.growth: Active experiments + outbound — signup schemas, hero entry, pricing copy, social posts
agent_roles.investor: Dealflow automation + 10-pick virtual portfolio + portfolio-tool sync roadmap — see agents/INVESTOR_CANON.md
agent_roles.pipeline: Keep match quality trustworthy — picky data gate (junk cleanup) enables credible skepticism

autopilot.weekly_full: All three LLM agents + pipeline dashboard

agent_priorities: signup: preview_cliffhanger gate — founder_signup_started from preview viewers
return: signal_delta teaser + preview email capture → return_visit_7d
pay: pricing_strip_viewed → pricing_viewed click-through on preview sticky bar
